title: Jabalpur Horror: Mother, Son Found Locked In Final Hug After Boat Capsize
description: A boat that capsized in Madhya Pradesh’s Jabalpur late on Thursday has left nine people dead and several missing. But it is the image of a woman clutching her four-year-old son that has left everyone speechless. Even state minister Rakesh Singh, present at the site, struggled to hold back tears.
